name: Wavetable Waveshaper
description: This algorithm is based on the Wavetable Waveshaper algorithm on the disting mk4. It is a wavetable-based waveshaper effect applied to audio, or more generally a wavetable-based transfer function considering the input as a CV lookup. It offers a great way to roll your own phase distortion synthesis.

parameters.name: Wave offset
parameters.description: Sets the position within the wavetable.

parameters.name: Input gain
parameters.description: The input gain. Negative values invert the signal.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: The output gain applied to the shaped signal.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The number of busses to process, starting from the Input. For example, for a stereo signal, set this to 2.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Input
input_ports.description: The first input bus to process.

input_ports.name: Gain input
input_ports.description: The bus to use to control the input gain. Scaled such that a 5V CV gives 32x gain.

input_ports.name: Wave input
input_ports.description: Sets an input bus to modulate the wave offset.

input_ports.name: Input
input_ports.description: The first input bus to process.
